titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Hasan Ibn Ali Al-Kufi
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Hasan Ibn Ali Al-Kufi

segments: ه عن الحسن بن عليّ الكوفيّ فقد رويته عن أبي- رحمه اللّه- عن عليّ بن الحسن بن عليّ الكوفيّ، عن أبيه. و رويته عن جعفر بن عليّ بن الحسن الكوفيّ، عن جدّه الحسن بن عليّ الكوفيّ‌.
arabic.text: ه عن الحسن بن عليّ الكوفيّ فقد رويته عن أبي- رحمه اللّه- عن عليّ بن الحسن بن عليّ الكوفيّ، عن أبيه. و رويته عن جعفر بن عليّ بن الحسن الكوفيّ، عن جدّه الحسن بن عليّ الكوفيّ‌.

segments:
Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Hasan ibn Ali Al-Kufi has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him - from Ali ibn Al-Hasan ibn Ali Al-Kufi, from his father.
I have also narrated it from Ja'far ibn Ali ibn Al-Hasan Al-Kufi, from his grandfather Al-Hasan ibn Ali Al-Kufi.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Hasan ibn Ali Al-Kufi has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him - from Ali ibn Al-Hasan ibn Ali Al-Kufi, from his father.
I have also narrated it from Ja'far ibn Ali ibn Al-Hasan Al-Kufi, from his grandfather Al-Hasan ibn Ali Al-Kufi.
